sections.paragraph:
- Original: λίαν

- Transliteration: Lian

- Phonetic: lee'-an

- Definition:

1. greatly, exceedingly, exceedingly beyond measure

- Origin: of uncertain affinity

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adverb

- Strong's: Of uncertain affinity; much (adverb): - exceeding great (-ly) sore very (+ chiefest).
